articles.headline: Australia clinch knockout berth with Paraguay also likely to advance
articles.description: Australia and Paraguay played to a 0-0 draw Thursday night in a result that clinched a spot in the knockout round of the World Cup for the Socceroos and will likely be enough for the Paraguayans to advance.

images.name: Australia vs Paraguay generic [1296x729]
images.caption: Paraguay's Julio Enciso and Australia's Alessandro Circati battle for the ball during the side's goalless draw.
images.alt: ulio Enciso #19 of Paraguay is challenged by Alessandro Circati #3 of Australia during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group D match between Paraguay and Australia at San Francisco Bay Area Stadium on June 25, 2026 in Santa Clara, California.

images.name: Will Miguel Almirón's absence hurt Paraguay?
images.caption: Roberto Rojas discusses the ripple effects of Miguel Almirón's red card on the Paraguay camp, and how the team will line up against the Socceroos.

articles.headline: USMNT World Cup bracket scenarios, odds to advance, predicted path to knockouts
articles.description: Who will Team USA face in the World Cup knockout rounds? What's the likely path? What are the odds? What do projection models say?

articles.headline: Socceroos vs. Paraguay: Australia fight to draw, qualify for R32
articles.description: Re-live all the action from what was an extremely tense 0-0 draw with Paraguay -- a result that sealed the Socceroos' spot in the 2026 FIFA World Cup knockout stages.

articles.headline: Socceroos draw with Paraguay, qualify for 2026 World Cup knockouts
articles.description: The Socceroos have moved into the FIFA World Cup's knockout stages after easing to a 0-0 draw with Paraguay.

videos.headline: USMNT fans celebrate early goal on Santa Cruz beach
videos.description: USMNT fans celebrate early goal on Santa Cruz beach

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC News (USMNT fans celebrate early goal on Santa Cruz beach) 2026/06/25 GLOBAL FIFA WORLD CUP

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal! Türkiye 0, USA 1. Auston Trusty (USA) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the right to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Sebastian Berhalter with a cross following a corner.
Goal! Türkiye 1, USA 1. Arda Güler (Türkiye) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Baris Alper Yilmaz.
Sebastian Berhalter (USA) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match because of an injury Salih Özcan (Türkiye).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Türkiye 2, USA 1. Baris Alper Yilmaz (Türkiye) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Orkun Kökçü.
First Half ends, Türkiye 2, USA 1.
Second Half begins Türkiye 2, USA 1.
Goal! Türkiye 2, USA 2. Sebastian Berhalter (USA) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner.
Substitution, USA. Christian Pulisic replaces Timothy Weah.
Delay in match because of an injury Ugurcan Çakir (Türkiye).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, USA. Sergiño Dest replaces Giovanni Reyna.
Substitution, USA. Álex Zendejas replaces Brenden Aaronson.
Substitution, USA. Alex Freeman replaces Joe Scally.
Substitution, Türkiye. Çaglar Söyüncü replaces Zeki Çelik.
Substitution, Türkiye. Can Uzun replaces Kenan Yildiz.
Substitution, USA. Malik Tillman replaces Weston McKennie.
Substitution, Türkiye. Kaan Ayhan replaces Orkun Kökçü.
Delay in match because of an injury Auston Trusty (USA).
Substitution, Türkiye. Mert Müldür replaces Oguz Aydin.
Substitution, Türkiye. Irfan Can Kahveci replaces Baris Alper Yilmaz.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Türkiye 3, USA 2. Kaan Ayhan (Türkiye) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner.
Second Half ends, Türkiye 3, USA 2.
